_description: TerraValue Soil Score v2 — a 0–100 composite of normalized environmental sub-scores. Definition-agnostic: weights live here, so 'pure stewardship' is just setting walkability/parkAccess weight to 0. Weights are renormalized over whichever sub-scores have real inputs, and confidence reflects input coverage.
_sources: Air quality: WHO 2021 Global Air Quality Guideline (annual PM2.5 = 5 µg/m³); US EPA NAAQS annual PM2.5 = 9 µg/m³ (2024)
Park access: EnviroAtlas BG metric — % residential population within 500 m of a park entrance (layer 35)
Walkability: EPA Smart Location Database — National Walkability Index (1–20)
Canopy: target 40% (Siriwardena/Cho optimal canopy range); matches the engine's legacy canopyPct ÷ 40 × 100 proxy

confidence._note: coverage = fraction of total weight backed by real (non-missing) inputs
